signals.headline: Bitcoin breaks $74K resistance | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin breaks $74K resistance | YES | HIGH confidence**
Bitcoin broke through the $74,000 resistance level on April 14, 2026, reaching a one-month high near $75,000 amid strong ETF inflows and institutional demand.[6] This triggered broad repricing across prediction markets, with probability that Bitcoin would be "$73,000 or above" by April 17 jumping 44 percentage points to 66%.[7]
